js:
function gFilter(cat, btn) { document.querySelectorAll('.gf').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); document.querySelectorAll('.m-item').forEach(item => { item.style.display = (cat === 'all' || item.dataset.cat === cat) ? 'flex' : 'none'; }); }
document.querySelectorAll('.m-item').forEach(item => { item.addEventListener('click', function() { this.style.transform = 'scale(1.05)'; setTimeout(() => this.style.transform = 'scale(1)', 300); }); });
